title: agropyron trachycaulum var. majus
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum var. majus, also known as big sand-reed or big sand bluegrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agropyron trachycaulum var. majus include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various skin conditions and minor wounds.
